name: Providence Bank
description_short: North Carolina-based community bank founded in 2006, offering personal and business banking with FDIC insurance and local decision-making.
description_long:
Providence Bank was established on March 14, 2006, and has grown to become one of the nation's top 100 community banks, ranking #35 out of 3,465 institutions. The bank is backed by PB Financial Corporation, its holding company, which trades on the OTCQX exchange under the symbol PBNC. The institution was built on the foundational belief in the power of local banking and community relationships.

Providence Bank offers comprehensive personal and business banking services, including business lending, business checking accounts, personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), online and mobile banking, bill pay, and mobile check deposit for personal accounts. The bank provides digital banking tools accessible through desktop online banking, mobile apps available on Apple and Google Play, and remote deposit capture services. They also offer financial calculators to help customers with planning.

The bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on local decision-making and community focus despite 20 years of growth. Providence Bank was the only North Carolina-based bank named to the 2025 OTCQX Best 50 list, recognized for top performance based on one-year total returns and average daily dollar volume growth. The institution actively serves small businesses, describing them as "the fuel and flavor" of their community, and has helped thousands of organizations access capital for growth.

Providence Bank is a legitimate, FDIC-insured community bank with established regulatory standing and institutional recognition. However, as a regional institution focused primarily on North Carolina operations, it may have more limited national reach and service options compared to larger national banks. The bank's strength lies in relationship-based community banking rather than cutting-edge financial technology or the broadest product suite.
services: Business lending and capital access programs
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Online banking for personal and business accounts
Mobile banking app with check deposit for personal accounts
Investor relations services for PB Financial Corporation shareholders
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Ranked #35 among nation's top 100 community banks out of 3,465 institutions
Only North Carolina-based bank named to 2025 OTCQX Best 50 list
Mobile banking app with check deposit functionality for personal accounts
Strong focus on small business lending with proven track record helping thousands of organizations
Local decision-making structure emphasizing community relationships over corporate policies
20-year track record of stable operations since 2006 founding
cons: Limited to primarily North Carolina geographic footprint with physical branch access constraints
Smaller institution may have fewer product offerings or specialized services compared to national banks
Website shows online banking enrollment link is currently non-functional, indicating potential technical infrastructure issues
As regional bank, may offer less competitive rates on some products compared to large national competitors

contact.address: 450 N Winstead Ave, Rocky Mount, NC 27804

best_for: Small business owners in North Carolina seeking relationship-based lending and local decision-making
Community-focused individuals in North Carolina wanting FDIC-insured banking from a top-performing regional bank
Business customers needing digital banking tools including online and mobile account management
Customers prioritizing personalized service and local branch access over large national bank convenience
diagnosis: Providence Bank is best for small business owners and individuals in North Carolina seeking personalized, relationship-focused community banking with FDIC insurance and local decision-making. The main caveat is that as a regional institution, it operates primarily in North Carolina and may have limited product breadth compared to larger national banks, with current technical issues affecting online enrollment functionality.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 450 N Winstead Ave, Rocky Mount, NC 27804
